message:
Expand DB error types, pool management, and TUI dashboard/search

- db/error.rs: +79 lines expanding structured error types for
  better error classification and reporting
- db/pool.rs: +83 lines improving connection pool management
  with enhanced health checking and retry logic
- db/lib.rs: module wiring adjustment
- tui_screens/dashboard.rs: +95 lines expanding dashboard with
  improved metric visualization and layout
- tui_screens/search.rs: +93 lines expanding search with
  additional result display modes and filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
